case_title: NETO VALMORDBA BAHIA BRIZILIAN RESTAURANT VS LARA MARIO DBA SURPLUS INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,538.00 FILED BY NETO VALMORDBA BAHIA BRIZILIAN RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT LARA MARIO DBA SURPLUS INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MARIO LARA RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NETO VALMORDBA BAHIA BRIZILIAN RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARA MARIO DBA SURPLUS INTERNATIONAL $2,538.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,558.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
